block_00: Aapke account se seva shulk liya gaya hai
block_02: Yah email aapko yah suchit karne ke liye hai ki aapka
block_04: ka trading account 90 dinon se sakriya nahin hai. Nitijtan, humare samaanya sulk niti ke anusaar aapke account par ek
block_06: seva shulk (ya anya mudra me samatuly raashi) lagaya gaya hai.
block_08: Humare Niyamon aur Sharton ke samaanya shulk anubhav ke anusaar
block_09: , 90 (nabbe) calendar dinon ki avdhi me trading account par koi sanchalan nahin hone ki stithi me, account ko nishkriya maana jayega aur company maasik seva shulk ke rup me graahak ke account ke shesh raashi se 10 Euro (ya shulk ki katauti ke din kisi anya mudra me samatulya raashi) laagu karne ke hakadaar hogi.
block_10: Apni sakriya sthiti ko restore karen
block_11: Agar aap humare saath trade karna jaari rakhna chaahte hain, to apne account ko fir se sakriya karne ke liye bas
block_13: platform par koi deal karen. Kripya dhyaan de ki yadi aapki account nishkriyata ki stithi me rahta hai to us par atirikt seva shulk lagaya ja sakta hai.
block_14: Yadi aap humari sevaon ka upyog karna jaari nahin rakhna chahte hain, to kripya apne account me jaayen aur apni dhanraashi nikaal le.
